name: Seeed Arduino mmWave
keywords: arduino, seeedstudio, mmwave, sensor, breathing, heartbeat, fall detection, xiao, esp32
description: Drivers for Seeed 60GHz mmWave sensors MR60BHA2 and MR60FDA2 on Seeed XIAO ESP32 boards. Core is dependency-free; extras/ helpers cover the onboard BH1750 and WS2812.
author: Seeed Studio
